verify_email.label: Verify your email
verify_email.description: Required before you can send SMS.

download_app.label: Download the Android app
download_app.description: Install Wablast SMS on your Android device.

api_key.label: Generate an API key
api_key.description: Used to connect your device or authenticate API calls.

register_device.label: Register your device
register_device.description: Link your phone to your account by scanning a QR code.

choose_plan.label: Choose your plan
choose_plan.description: Pick the plan that fits your usage.

first_message.label: Send your first message
first_message.description: Send your first message from the dashboard.

dialog.title: Register your device
dialog.desc: Follow these steps to link your phone to your account.
dialog.s1: Generate an API key in the step above (if you have not already).
dialog.s2: Download the Wablast SMS Android app from <link>our download link</link>.
dialog.s3: Open the app and grant SMS permissions when prompted.
dialog.s4: In the app, register your device by scanning the QR code shown when you generate an API key, or paste the key manually.
dialog.s5: Your phone should appear under Registered Devices on this dashboard when the link succeeds.

auth.loginSubtitle: Enter your credentials to access your account
auth.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
auth.marketingOptIn: I want to receive updates about new features and promotions
auth.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters long
auth.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters long
auth.registerSubtitle: Enter your details to get started
